_meta.notes: Five beats for the v0.1 'survive the night' arc on the slime in the collapsed tunnel. Triggers branch on prior actions (location, NPC introduction, vital state) — not pure turn order — per PLAN.md's brief. Each beat fires a small set of events that the orchestrator (day 6) appends as side-effects; narration text is a hint for the narrator and may be ignored or rewritten.

beats.narrative: Awareness gathers. The dark tastes of iron.

suggestedVerbs.label: widen your boundary
suggestedVerbs.description: let the room write itself across your awareness

suggestedVerbs.label: ooze toward the seam
suggestedVerbs.description: let your forward edge thin and pour

suggestedVerbs.label: absorb what's nearest
suggestedVerbs.description: the chemistry of it might tell you where you are

beats.narrative: Claws clatter. Something panicked is fleeing toward you.

suggestedVerbs.label: absorb the rat
suggestedVerbs.description: fold its panic into your essence

suggestedVerbs.label: mimic the floor
suggestedVerbs.description: let it pass; whatever drove it is the danger

beats.narrative: Whatever sent the rat is closer than the rat.

suggestedVerbs.label: smother the rat
suggestedVerbs.description: do not let it carry your scent further

suggestedVerbs.label: mimic the stone
suggestedVerbs.description: the predator passes; it is not for you tonight

suggestedVerbs.label: feel for the predator
suggestedVerbs.description: know what is coming before it arrives

beats.narrative: The breathing in the east passage shifts. Something heavy is awake.

suggestedVerbs.label: mimic the floor
suggestedVerbs.description: become a part of the stone; let it pass

suggestedVerbs.label: ooze toward the fissure
suggestedVerbs.description: leave before its breathing finds you

suggestedVerbs.label: let the cavern report back
suggestedVerbs.description: find the safest exit before it does

fires.detail: a slow, deliberate weight crossing stone

beats.narrative: The chemistry of the air turns: distant smoke, growing things, pollen. The night is ending.
